items.title: Elevated errors on Claude.ai, API, Claude Code
items.snippet: [critical] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Degraded service on usage and analytics admin API endpoints
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Claude.ai down
items.snippet: [critical] resolved — We have resolved the issue resulting in elevated errors on login for Claude.ai and Claude Code betwen 15:31 to 16:19 UTC.

items.title: Email login down
items.snippet: [major] resolved — Email login was broken between approximately 3:46 PM and 4:52 PM PDT on April 10, 2026.

items.title: Elevated errors on requests to Claude models
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — The issue affecting requests to non-Opus models has been resolved.

items.title: Some Claude.ai share links were inaccessible
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — Between April 2 and April 10, some users who were not signed in to Claude.ai (web, mobile, desktop) were not able to access some Claude.ai sharing links.

items.title: Degraded Performance on Vaults
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Elevated Connector Error Rates
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Sonnet 4.6 elevated rate of errors
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Errors when connecting to Claude.ai
items.snippet: [none] resolved — Some users experienced an error when trying to access Claude.ai on desktop and the web from 23:22–23:50 UTC. This issue has now been resolved.

items.title: Outage affecting Workspace Creation
items.snippet: [none] resolved — The issue affecting API workspace creation has been resolved. Impact occurred from approximately 4:15 PM to 7:30 PM UTC.

items.title: Elevated errors on Claude.ai, API, Claude Code
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — From 17:25–17:44 UTC, we saw elevated errors on attempts to log into Claude.ai (mobile, web, and desktop) and platform.claude.com, as well as /login attempts via Claude Code. This issue is now resolved.

items.title: Sonnet 4.6 elevated rate of errors
items.snippet: [major] resolved — The incident is now resolved. Sonnet 4.6 exhibited errors above baseline between 23:00 PT / 7:00 UTC and 1:50 PT / 9:50 UTC.

items.title: Elevated errors on Claude.ai
items.snippet: [critical] resolved — From 14:32–15:12 UTC, we saw elevated errors impacting various Claude services, including Claude.ai and Claude Code authentication. These errors have been resolved.

items.title: Sonnet 4.6 elevated rate of errors
items.snippet: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Elevated errors on Claude.ai
items.snippet: [major] resolved — From 15:00–16:30 UTC on April 6, we saw elevated errors on login for Claude.ai and Claude Code. This issue also affected some Claude.ai conversations and other product functionality such as voice mode. This issue is now resolved.

items.title: Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 elevated error rate
items.snippet: [none] resolved — Between 10:09 and 10:31 PDT, Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 experienced elevated error rates across most product surfaces.

items.title: Elevated errors on requests to Claude Sonnet 4.6
items.snippet: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Errors on the Claude.ai desktop application
items.snippet: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

items.title: Elevated errors on requests to Claude Opus 4.6
items.snippet: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.
